## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Change Type

- [ ] docs
- [ ] fix
- [ ] feature
- [ ] refactor (non-behavioral)
- [ ] build/chore

## Validation

- [ ] `pio run` passes locally
- [ ] Behavior of control FSM is unchanged or intentionally documented
- [ ] Safety behavior (upper sensor emergency stop) preserved
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed
- [ ] Changelog updated under Unreleased

## Deployment Impact

Describe any required configuration or migration steps.

## Testing Notes

Provide test scenario details and observed results.

## Checklist

- [ ] No unintended logic changes in pump/alarm control
- [ ] No secret credentials added
- [ ] No unrelated files modified
